@0xblz

designer

Experience

Since 2022, I've been part of PartyDAO, where I design UNO, the most widely used wallet on World. I've also contributed to the design of ORO, Diamante, and Party, a group chat with a shared wallet that can do anything on-chain.

From 2021 to 2022, I was the founding designer at Showtime and collaborated with WorkOS on marketing graphics. Earlier in my career at Bitovi, I delivered major web projects for Lowe's and Levi's. Before that, I worked as a freelance designer specializing in 3D projects, and at Scribd, where I helped design and refine their core website.

Projects

Wind Vector - 3D visualization tool for exploring wind patterns at different flight levels. Currently in demo only.

Colors - Palette generator that allows you to explore color harmony modes, adjust hue, saturation, and brightness, and visualize color schemes in a 3D environment.

How's the Roads? - Check live highway conditions, weather, and traffic cameras in Kansas City. You can also save your favorite cameras for quick access. More cities soon.

Holy Hues - Browse Bible verses across multiple translations, customize colors and fonts, and create personalized verse wallpapers.
